meta.summary: Utilities for manipulating GFA and rGFA sequence graphs, including subgraph extraction, statistics, FASTA/BED conversion, graph transformation, and PAF-to-GFA conversion.
meta.description: Utilities for manipulating GFA and rGFA sequence graphs, including subgraph extraction, statistics, FASTA/BED conversion, graph transformation, and PAF-to-GFA conversion.

test:
mkdir -p /tmp/taf-gfatools-gfa && cd /tmp/taf-gfatools-gfa && printf 'S	s1	ACGT	SN:Z:chr1	SO:i:0	SR:i:0
S	s2	TTAA	SN:Z:chr1	SO:i:4	SR:i:0
L	s1	+	s2	+	0M
' > tiny.gfa && gfatools stat tiny.gfa > stat.txt && grep -F 'Number of segments: 2' stat.txt >/dev/null && gfatools gfa2fa tiny.gfa > segments.fa && grep -F '>s1' segments.fa >/dev/null && grep -F 'ACGT' segments.fa >/dev/null && gfatools view -S tiny.gfa > noseq.gfa && test -s noseq.gfa

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-gfatools-rgfa && cd /tmp/taf-gfatools-rgfa && printf 'S	s1	ACGT	SN:Z:chr1	SO:i:0	SR:i:0
S	s2	TTAA	SN:Z:chr1	SO:i:4	SR:i:0
L	s1	+	s2	+	0M
' > tiny.gfa && gfatools gfa2fa -s tiny.gfa > stable.fa && grep -F '>chr1' stable.fa >/dev/null && grep -F 'ACGTTTAA' stable.fa >/dev/null && gfatools gfa2bed -s tiny.gfa > stable.bed && grep -F 'chr1' stable.bed >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-gfatools-asm && cd /tmp/taf-gfatools-asm && printf 'S	s1	ACGT	SN:Z:chr1	SO:i:0	SR:i:0
S	s2	TTAA	SN:Z:chr1	SO:i:4	SR:i:0
L	s1	+	s2	+	0M
' > tiny.gfa && gfatools asm -u tiny.gfa > unitigs.gfa && test -s unitigs.gfa && grep -F 'S' unitigs.gfa >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-gfatools-paf2gfa && cd /tmp/taf-gfatools-paf2gfa && printf 'r1\t10\t5\t10\t+\tr2\t10\t0\t5\t5\t5\t60\n' > tiny.paf && paf2gfa -o 1 tiny.paf > graph.gfa && test -s graph.gfa && grep -F 'L' graph.gfa >/dev/null
